markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, Q1 priorities, and upcoming product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Pivot:** Prioritize high-performing competitor comparison content and salary guides for structural/MEP engineers. The Leads launch is now mid-Feb, requiring a messaging shift to an "all-in-one" product narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [**Q1 Priorities:** Content will support SDRs ("de-risk the team"), target engineers, and drive the Leads product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**Website Messaging Overhaul:** The site will shift from benefit-led to SEO-driven messaging, framing Monograph as an "all-in-one" platform with keyword-aligned sub-products (e.g., "architect document management software").](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [**Reporting & Maintenance:** Growth X will filter product pages from reports for accurate marketing analysis. Monograph will provide a list of \~2-year-old high-traffic pages for simple date refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

## Topics

### Q1 Priorities & Strategic Context

  - [Monograph's Q1 priorities will guide content strategy:](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
    1.  [**De-risk the team:** Provide organic "air cover" for SDR cold outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
    2.  [**Product marketing/story:** Shift to an "all-in-one" product narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
    3.  [**Engineers/non-architects:** Expand market reach beyond architects.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
    4.  [**New product launch:** Support the Leads product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [This strategy is driven by a planned website messaging overhaul.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [**Current:** Benefit-led (e.g., "Leverage reports"), which lacks SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
      - [**Future:** SEO-driven, framing Monograph as an "all-in-one" platform with keyword-aligned sub-products (e.g., "architect document management software").](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Replicate the successful model from Allison's previous company, Canopy, to align organic content with high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [**Leads Launch:** The launch is now targeted for mid-February (original Q1 plan).](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
      - [Product updates require a messaging shift to an "all-in-one" narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [Growth X will continue building authority around the "CRM" keyword, using mid-funnel content to frame Monograph's product as a viable alternative to a full CRM.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**Software Comparison Content:** Double down on this high-opportunity area.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
      - [**Focus:** Competitor comparisons, which are driving leads.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Avoid cannibalizing existing main navigation comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [**Salary Content:** Pivot from civil engineering to Monograph's ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [**New Targets:** Structural engineers and MEP engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [**Guidance:** "Engineers" is sufficient for MEP; "structural engineers" must be explicit.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Create broader content for key roles (Principals, Owners, Operations Leaders).](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Performance Reporting & Site Maintenance

  - [**Reporting Accuracy:** Growth X will filter product pages (e.g., `/projects`, `/overview`) from performance reports.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To provide a clearer view of marketing page performance.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Page Refreshes:** Monograph has a list of \~2-year-old, high-traffic pages needing simple date updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [**Proposal:** Growth X to handle updates (e.g., "2023" → "2025").](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [**Constraint:** This work may reduce net-new content volume unless pricing is adjusted.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Allison:**](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
      - [Review the performance report and send async questions to Katya by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
      - [Share the spreadsheet of high-traffic pages for refresh consideration.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [Share Monograph's Q1 priorities document.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Consult the Growth X team on filtering product pages from reports.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Consult the Growth X team on the feasibility and pricing of page refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
      - [Review the Monograph website messaging and provide feedback in early January.](https://fathom.video/share/Bep2z1NzduQ-z1Fg1es5R65WDPQfWQyD?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
